Heresius.name: His Will Be Done
Heresius.effect: All wound losses caused by the target count twice for any combat resolution.

Heresius.name: Witchhammer
Heresius.effect: Starting at the caster going outwards, D3 enemy psykers suffer a Perils of the Warp attack.

Heresius.name: Word of the Emperor
Heresius.effect: All tests of enemy models to use a psychic power, an incantation, a prayer or similar abilities receive a penalty of -1.

Heresius.name: Purgatus
Heresius.effect: Both the caster and the target roll a D6 and add their respective Leadership values. If the target's total is greater than the caster's total, nothing happens. If the Psyker's total is greater than or equal to the target's total, the target model suffers a -3 penalty to its Leadership.
Heresius.duration: Until the end of the game

Heresius.name: Divine Pronouncement
Heresius.effect: The target is treated as activating in difficult and dangerous terrain, even if it would normally ignore it.

Heresius.name: Soul-lightning
Heresius.effect: The target unit suffers a hit with the following profile: S: 5 AP: -1 D: 1; Barrage, Seeking.

Telethesia.name: Psychic Fortitude
Telethesia.effect: The target can't gain Battleshock tokens by any means and loses all current tokens.

Telethesia.name: Warding Incantation
Telethesia.effect: The target gains the "Aegis(4+)" and "Warded" abilities. All terrain around the target within 6" is treated as difficult and dangerous for enemy units, even if they would normally ignore it.

Telethesia.name: Castigation
Telethesia.effect: Roll 3D6 and substract the target's Leadership. The unit receives that amount of automatic wounds with S:4 AP:0 D:1, Seeking.

Telethesia.name: Psychic Pursuit
Telethesia.effect: Select a friendly and an enemy unit within 12". The enemy unit does not receive the benefits of cover against attacks from the friendly unit.

Telethesia.name: Scouring
Telethesia.effect: Each model of the target reduce their number of attacks by 1 (to a minimum of 1).

Telethesia.name: Terrify
Telethesia.effect: The target must pass a Leadership test with a -1 penalty or gain a Battleshock token.
